reforms.description: In April 2025, Spain implemented reforms to make retirement more flexible, allowing all individuals entitled to a pension to combine work and pension receipt after deferring retirement by at least one year. This reform aims to encourage longer working lives and support intergenerational employment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By incentivizing older workers to remain in the labor force longer, the reform enhances the labor supply and utilizes the experience of older workers, contributing positively to economic productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms were put into effect in April 2025.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in retirement policy, promoting longer working lives and addressing labor market challenges associated with an aging population.
reforms.source_quote: In April 2025, Spain implemented reforms to make retirement more flexible and increase incentives to work beyond the statutory retirement age.

reforms.description: Spain's plan to modernise vocational education and training (VET) includes significant reforms aimed at expanding training opportunities for older workers, with a focus on flexible, modular options tailored to diverse backgrounds and needs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing the skills of older workers through targeted training, the reform aims to improve employability and address skill obsolescence, thereby supporting economic productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The transformation of the VET system included significant reforms, such as expanding the range of training available.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a comprehensive approach to improving vocational training, addressing the needs of older workers and enhancing the overall skill level of the workforce.
reforms.source_quote: The plan to modernise VET includes adult learners but, despite on-going implementation, the uptake by older workers remains weak.

reforms.description: Spain aims to improve access to finance for SMEs by promoting public-private cooperation to connect high growth potential SMEs with capital market participants, thereby expanding their financing options.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing access to finance for SMEs can stimulate innovation and productivity growth, contributing positively to the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative to connect SMEs with capital market participants has been publicly announced.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to enhance SME financing, which is crucial for their growth and innovation potential.
reforms.source_quote: Promoting the use of market-based financing among SMEs by encouraging public-private cooperation to connect high growth potential SMEs with capital market participants can expand access to financing.

reforms.description: Spain is leveraging the Recovery and Resilience Plan funding to expand targeted digital advisory and training tailored to SMEs, aiming to enhance their digital capabilities and productivity.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving digital skills among SMEs can lead to higher productivity and innovation, positively impacting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan to expand digital advisory and training for SMEs has been publicly announced.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative is a significant step towards enhancing the digital capabilities of SMEs, which is essential for their competitiveness and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Spain should fully leverage the Recovery and Resilience Plan funding to expand targeted digital advisory and training tailored to SMEs.

reforms.description: Spain's Recovery, Transformation, and Resilience Plan (RTRP) has supported near-term growth and helped crowd in private investment, particularly in digital and green sectors, with 69% of the funds disbursed by August 2025.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The RTRP aims to stimulate investment in key sectors, enhancing productivity and innovation, which supports long-term economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: 69% of the funds had been disbursed by August 2025.
reforms.importance_rationale: The RTRP represents a significant structural reform aimed at transforming the economy through targeted investments, with potential long-lasting impacts on growth and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Spain’s Recovery, Transformation, and Resilience Plan (RTRP) has supported near term growth and helped crowd in private investment, particularly in digital and green sectors.

reforms.description: The Spanish government launched the Social Housing Promotion Facility Plan, aiming to build 43,000 affordable rental homes through public-private partnerships, financed by EUR 6 billion in government loans and guarantees.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This initiative is expected to increase the supply of affordable housing, thereby improving living conditions and potentially boosting local economies.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan aims to build 43,000 affordable rental homes through public-private partnerships.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in affordable housing, addressing a critical social issue and aiming to improve the overall housing market in Spain.
reforms.source_quote: The Social Housing Promotion Facility Plan aims to build 43,000 affordable rental homes through public-private partnerships.

reforms.description: Spain has proposed amendments to the Law on Land and Urban Rehabilitation to simplify and accelerate urban planning and land development procedures, aiming to make more land buildable and promote energy-efficient building practices.
reforms.component_name: Amendments to the Law on Land and Urban Rehabilitation
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By streamlining urban planning processes, this reform is expected to enhance the efficiency of land use and promote sustainable development, which can stimulate economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The draft reform aims to simplify planning approvals and clarify land classification.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform addresses systemic barriers in urban development, potentially leading to significant improvements in housing supply and urban infrastructure.
reforms.source_quote: The amendments aim to simplify and accelerate urban planning and land development procedures to make more land buildable.

reforms.description: Spain is increasing direct R&D support targeted at SMEs to enhance their innovation capabilities and competitiveness.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Increased R&D funding for SMEs is expected to boost innovation, leading to higher productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has committed to increasing direct R&D support for SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant increase in support for a key sector of the economy, aiming to enhance innovation and competitiveness among SMEs.
reforms.source_quote: Increasing direct R&D support targeted at SMEs.

reforms.description: In 2023, the Ministry of Science and Innovation launched the 'Knowledge Transfer and Collaboration Plan: Science and Innovation at the Service of Society' to strengthen R&D+I links between the public and private sectors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances collaboration between businesses and research institutions, facilitating the commercialization of research outputs and fostering innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan was launched to strengthen R&D+I links.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to enhance collaboration between the public and private sectors, which is crucial for improving innovation outcomes.
reforms.source_quote: In 2023 the Ministry of Science and Innovation launched the 'Knowledge Transfer and Collaboration Plan: Science and Innovation at the Service of Society' to strengthen R&D+I links between the public and private sectors.

reforms.description: The Ministry of Economy, Trade, and Business is developing 'Regimen 20', a national framework to establish a common framework of minimum rules across regions to reduce regulatory barriers for SMEs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing regulatory burdens, the reform aims to facilitate market entry and growth for SMEs, thereby enhancing their innovation capacity.
reforms.status_evidence: The Ministry is developing a national framework to establish minimum rules across regions.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to streamline regulations across regions, which can have a broad impact on SMEs' operational efficiency and innovation potential.
reforms.source_quote: The Ministry of Economy, Trade, and Business is developing 'Regimen 20', a national framework to establish a common framework of minimum rules across regions.

reforms.description: The Ley Startup aims to create a favourable environment for the establishment and growth of startups by offering tax incentives, reducing administrative hurdles, and measures to attract talent and investment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing barriers and providing incentives, the law encourages startup formation and growth, which can enhance innovation and economic dynamism.
reforms.status_evidence: The law has been enacted and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The Ley Startup represents a significant overhaul of the regulatory framework for startups, aiming to stimulate innovation and entrepreneurship at a national level.
reforms.source_quote: The Ley Startup aims to create a favourable environment for the establishment and growth of startups by offering tax incentives, reducing administrative hurdles, and measures to attract talent and investment.

reforms.description: The Ley Crea y Crece aims to stimulate business creation by reducing and streamlining the procedures and conditions for establishing a company, promoting electronic invoicing, and strengthening alternative financing methods for SMEs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By simplifying the process of starting a business and enhancing access to financing, the law encourages entrepreneurship and innovation among SMEs.
reforms.status_evidence: The law has been enacted and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The Ley Crea y Crece introduces significant changes to the regulatory environment for business creation, which is crucial for fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The Ley Crea y Crece aims to stimulate business creation by reducing and streamlining the procedures and conditions for establishing a company.

reforms.description: Spain's SME Digitalization Plan 2021-2025 aims to accelerate the digital transformation of over 1.5 million SMEs through various initiatives, including the Kit Digital, which subsidizes the adoption of digital solutions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By subsidizing digital solutions, the initiative enhances productivity and innovation among SMEs, contributing to overall economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Kit Digital has granted over 676,000 subsidies to SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: This comprehensive plan represents a significant investment in the digital capabilities of SMEs, which is crucial for enhancing their competitiveness and innovation potential.
reforms.source_quote: The government has implemented several programmes to boost the digitalization of SMEs through the SME Digitalization Plan 2021-2025.

reforms.description: Spain's R&D tax credit system has been enhanced to simplify access for SMEs, allowing them to monetize tax credits even in the absence of sufficient tax liability, thus promoting R&D investment.
reforms.component_name: Simplified R&D Tax Credits for SMEs
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By simplifying access to R&D tax credits, the reform encourages more SMEs to invest in research and development, fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been passed into law but is not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the accessibility of R&D funding for SMEs, which is critical for enhancing their innovation capabilities.
reforms.source_quote: Generous R&D tax credits are a central element of Spain’s innovation support system, but access is perceived as complex and administratively burdensome.

reforms.description: Spain has introduced the 2024-2025 Immigration and Integration Law, which modernizes the migration system to improve labor market access for migrants and expand regularization pathways.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving labor market access and supporting the integration of migrants, the reform is expected to enhance productivity and innovation in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The Immigration and Integration Law was officially enacted in 2024.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of Spain's migration policy, aiming to enhance labor market integration and support economic growth through skilled migration.
reforms.source_quote: Spain has recently introduced reforms, including the 2024-2025 Immigration and Integration Law, which modernizes Spain’s migration system, focusing on integration and improving labor market access for migrants.

reforms.description: The Collective Management of Recruitment at Origin (GECCO) has been reformed to offer legally recruited workers multiyear visas and support for circular mobility, enhancing the integration of migrant workers.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating legal recruitment and mobility, the reform aims to improve labor market integration and productivity among migrant workers.
reforms.status_evidence: The GECCO reform was officially enacted in 2024.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform enhances existing recruitment frameworks, improving the integration of migrant workers and supporting economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The Collective Management of Recruitment at Origin (GECCO) which is part of Spain’s broader migration policy, offers important benefits such as legally recruited workers, multiyear visas and support for circular mobility and was also reformed.
